title: cotoneaster × intermedius
intro: Cotoneaster × intermedius is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Cotoneaster horizontalis and Cotoneaster integrifolius, which is a type of flowering shrub known for its ornamental value. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cotoneaster × intermedius include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Cotoneaster × intermedius typically involve infusing the leaves in hot water or using them in a topical cream or salve to harness its medicinal properties.
